title: Gentle Hands
lesson: Be gentle and kind to little animals.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a sunny home garden, kneeling on soft green grass and beaming with excitement at a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead. Medium shot at eye level, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, the face facing the camera and fully unobstructed. Warm natural sunlight, flowers and a low wooden fence behind, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene in the same sunny home garden: the person from the input image leans forward and reaches out both hands too eagerly toward a small fluffy brown puppy, while the puppy shrinks back and tucks its tail, ears flattened. Medium shot at eye level, the person's head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, face front-on and unobstructed with a surprised expression. Warm light, green grass and flowers, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A storybook scene in the same sunny home garden. The person from the input image kneels on the far left, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, face front-on and unobstructed, watching attentively. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches calmly and holds out one slow, open hand to show how to be soft and gentle with a small fluffy brown puppy that sits between them. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image kneels alone on the soft grass of the sunny home garden, very gently stroking the back of a small fluffy brown puppy with one slow, soft hand. Medium shot at eye level, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, the face front-on, unobstructed, with a calm, tender smile. Warm sunlight, flowers in the background, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the person from the input image sitting on the grass in the sunny home garden as a small fluffy brown puppy relaxes and snuggles up against their side, eyes softly closed and tail wagging. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a gentle, happy expression, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Warm golden light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A warm closing storybook scene in the sunny home garden. The person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a joyful smile, gently cradling a happy, content small fluffy brown puppy in their lap. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits beside them, looking on proudly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm golden sunlight, flowers and a low wooden fence behind, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
